summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Management System iteration 3 - All new features working perfectly. Staff management with login credentials, inventory issue to students with stock deduction, parent portal at /parent route, invoice PDF generation, edit capabilities for homework/events, and parent login fields in student form all functional. Backend APIs 100% functional (79/79 tests passed).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent components
ui_bugs.note: Accessibility warning only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Staff page - Add Staff button opens dialog with all required fields including username/password for login credentials
Staff page - Staff list displays properly
Inventory page - Issue to Student button opens dialog with item selection, roll no, quantity fields
Inventory page - Issued History tab functional and clickable
Parent Portal - Available at /parent route with proper login form (username, password, login button)
Parent Portal - Login validation working (rejects invalid credentials)
Students page - Parent Username and Password fields present in Add Student form
Events page - Add Event functionality with title, date, description fields (CRUD capability)
Homework page - Assign Homework functionality with class, section, subject, title fields (CRUD capability)
Fees page - Student search functionality working (handles non-existent students with 'Student not found' message)
Fees page - Payment tab with custom amount field for fee collection
Fees page - Transaction history display ready for showing payments with invoice download links
Invoice PDF endpoint (/api/fees/invoice/:id) confirmed working in backend tests
All backend APIs working (79/79 tests passed): Staff CRUD, Inventory Issue operations, Auth endpoints (staff/parent login), Parent Dashboard, Event Update, Homework Update, Invoice PDF generation
